title: astragalus fabaceus
intro: Astragalus fabaceus, also known as the milkvetch or locoweed, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus fabaceus is believed to have numerous health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving immune function, and enhancing antioxidant defenses, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, capsules, and tinctures.
